auth.login_timeout: Login timed out. Please try again.
auth.login_connection_reset: Connection to the login server was reset. Please try again later.
auth.login_unreachable: Can't reach the login server. Check your network and try again.
auth.internal: Internal error. Please try again later.
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

network.service_unreachable_desc: Network or server error. This recording was cancelled.
network.check_and_retry: Check your network and try again.

recording.hotkey_sync_failed: Failed to sync hotkeys to Rust: {{error}}

stt.transcribe_empty_desc: Server timed out or audio was silent.

meetings.meeting_provider_unsupported: Dictation channel doesn't support speaker diarization
meetings.meeting_provider_unsupported_hint: Switch the dictation channel to Custom → Tencent and fill in AppID / SecretId / SecretKey.
meetings.meeting_provider_not_configured_hint: Open Settings → Dictation and configure a custom provider first.
meetings.network_exit_hint: The realtime ASR connection was dropped. Check your network and try again.
meetings.idle_timeout_hint: The provider closed the session after a long silence. Resume to reconnect.
meetings.unauthenticated_byok_hint: Re-check the AppID / SecretId / SecretKey of the active Tencent provider.
meetings.insufficient_funds_hint: Top up the Tencent ASR account or switch to another provider.
